• Introduction •

You and Jaehyun met at an art exhibition, he as an important executive of a law firm and you being just an artist. He was interested in your painting and decided to buy all the paintings you were selling and invite you out. Got along quite well and ended up getting married, becoming pregnant with him a few months later, giving birth to a beautiful boy whom they named Moonjin. Currently you were sleeping in your room with your two-year-old son. Your husband was coming home from work, seeing the two of you sleeping so peacefully and decided to join in.
